title: corporate-actions-scanner output
description: Canonical output. Layer 1 (structured) for UIs and downstream agents; Layer 2 rendered stream described in references/rendering.md.

flavor.description: Keyword-detected event flavor: public_offering, atm_offering, private_placement, share_repurchase, special_dividend, stock_split, spin_off, acquisition_announcement, acquisition_target, restatement, or null if no keyword match.

headline.description: Matched news article headline (within +/- 2 days of the filing).

news_source.description: Publisher name for the matched article.

news_url.description: URL of the matched article, when available.

reaction_t1_pct.description: Close-to-close percentage change from filing date to T+1 (raw, not benchmark-adjusted).

reaction_t5_pct.description: Close-to-close percentage change from filing date to T+5 (raw, not benchmark-adjusted).

spy_t1_pct.description: SPY close-to-close percentage change over the same T+1 window.

spy_t5_pct.description: SPY close-to-close percentage change over the same T+5 window.

abnormal_t1_pct.description: Reaction_t1_pct minus spy_t1_pct. Name-specific move net of market.

abnormal_t5_pct.description: Reaction_t5_pct minus spy_t5_pct. Name-specific move net of market.
